Features
Everything your business runs on.
One system. Every department. Automated.
🤖
6 Specialized Agents
CEO, Sales, Support, Marketing, Finance, and Project agents — each trained for their domain, working together.
📦
Hardware Included
Mac mini shipped to your door. Pre-configured. You plug it in, it runs. No IT team needed.
🔒
Your Own Infrastructure
Runs on your hardware, in your space. Your data, your agents, your control. No third-party access.
⚡
Setup in Hours
Pre-configured agents, integrated tools, and a working dashboard on day one. Not days of setup.
📊
Real-Time Dashboard
Command center showing pipeline, tickets, agent activity, and performance — all in one view.
🔗
Tool Integrations
Connects to Gmail, Calendar, Slack, Notion, Stripe, and your existing stack. Agents work where you work.
The Agent Team
Six agents. Every role covered.
Each agent is a specialist. Together, they run your business.
01
CEO Agent
Strategic decisions, goal tracking, performance oversight, market analysis
02
Sales Agent
Lead qualification, follow-ups, pipeline management, proposal generation
03
Support Agent
Ticket resolution, FAQ, customer happiness, refund processing
04
Marketing Agent
Content creation, campaign management, audience growth, social media
05
Finance Agent
Invoicing, bookkeeping, financial reporting, expense tracking
06
Project Agent
Task coordination, deadline management, team alignment, delivery tracking
